title: Unity Software Analyst Ratings and Price Targets
text: Analyst Coverage Summary: Unity Software has analyst coverage from 26-35 analysts depending on the source, with a clear majority holding bullish views. Consensus Rating: Buy rating from majority of analysts, with ratings split as approximately 62.5% Buy, 34.72% Hold, and 2.78% Sell. Price Target Consensus: Average price target of $34-37, with a range from $16 (conservative) to $59 (bullish). This implies 42-88% upside potential from current trading levels. Recent Analyst Actions (May 2026): Multiple analysts raised price targets following Q1 2026 earnings beat and Vector platform momentum confirmation. Banks including Morgan Stanley, Wedbush, Wells Fargo, Jefferies, and Needham upgraded or raised targets. Key Analyst Themes: Positive on Vector platform growth (49% YoY in Q1 2026), Create Solutions subscription expansion (15% growth), path to GAAP profitability by Q4 2026, and strategic turnaround execution under CEO Matt Bromberg. Cautionary Notes: Some analysts highlight near-term volatility risk, execution risk on profitability timeline, and macro headwinds in gaming and advertising sectors.
